title: Streaming Events, Accessible Status, Cancellation, Reconnect, and Rendering · Contract Workshop
summary: A public-interest product team incrementally builds accessible typed agent event stream from original fixed provider, interaction, tool, approval, evaluation, and failure fixtures while retaining prior Python, HTTP, prompt, loop, security, accessibility, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of accessible typed agent event stream while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pract…
objectives: Define typed lifecycle, model delta, tool request, approval, tool progress, result, warning, error, terminal, and usage events with stable identity.
Assemble ordered deltas and state snapshots idempotently while preserving call, interaction, retry, and terminal boundaries.
Announce meaningful milestones through restrained live regions, expose structured text, keep headings and focus stable, and avoid color-only meaning.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Stream Reconnect Dedup
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-stream-reconnect-dedup-32pfm8" that uses case 2423 to render typed streaming events with deterministic assembly, restrained announcements, keyboard cancellation, reconnect identity, and no color-only state. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Stream Reconnect Dedup.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Stream Reconnect Dedup into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Stream Reconnect Dedup, keep Stream Reconnect Dedup connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-stream-reconnect-dedup-32pfm8
# Competency: agentpy-stream-reconnect-dedup.
# Case 2423: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_stream_reconnect_dedup_32pfm8(events: int = 80, assembled_events: int = 80, announced_milestones: int = 8, cancellable_states: int = 5, duplicate_events: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_32pfm8 = "32pfm8-8mfp23-2423"
    assert evidence_variant_32pfm8
    evidence_axes_32pfm8 = (
        "authority32pfm8",
        "interaction2423",
        "tool8mfp23",
        "state32pfm82423",
        "evaluation242332pfm8",
        "recovery8mfp232423",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_32pfm8)) == 6
    if events < 1 or assembled_events < 0:
        return False, assembled_events, "stream-event-count"
    if assembled_events != events:
        return False, assembled_events, "stream-assembly"
    if announced_milestones < 4 or cancellable_states < 2:
        return False, announced_milestones, "accessible-stream-control"
    if duplicate_events > 0:
        return False, duplicate_events, "stream-duplication"
    assert assembled_events == events and duplicate_events == 0
    return True, assembled_events, "accessible-agent-event-stream"
